iterations.decision: Build an outer ring around the union of the yellow curve, bridge layer, and true-alpha calendar; keep internal seams and the left concave opening unpainted.
iterations.reason: The structural fix is present, but source-composited rim pixels and missing original font/vector layers prevent a strict pixel pass.
